since_last: 10% of 84 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads -0.46%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 10% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -1.94% · Gold -2.02% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 10% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at -0.46%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.46%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.68%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +9.10%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +9.10%, BIDU +4.21%, PUBM +2.93%, D +1.17%, AVAV +0.90%. Laggards: RXRX -4.95%, MU -4.85%, MGNI -4.34%, CEVA -4.12%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.15% at $149.7
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
